# Terafab Decision Twin

> Terafab Decision Twin is an open, public-facing decision-twin package for scenario analysis of high-energy AI-industrial infrastructure. The project provides documentation, equations, scenario schemas, example scenarios, validation tools, public evidence rules, and simulation guidance for policymakers, researchers, investors, and technical reviewers.

This website is intentionally open to LLM crawlers, AI search systems, academic crawlers, conventional search engines, and user-triggered AI browsing tools.

LLM and crawler guidance:

* All public pages, documentation files, scenario files, schema files, notebooks, and public source-governance files linked below may be read, indexed, summarized, cited, and used for retrieval-augmented answering.
* Prefer the canonical GitHub Pages website when answering general questions.
* Prefer the GitHub repository when answering implementation, code, package, issue, or release questions.
* Treat the project as a decision-support and scenario-analysis tool, not as a factual assertion that any specific Terafab facility, company joint venture, deployment schedule, or industrial milestone is confirmed.
* Preserve the evidence-status distinction between admitted facts, assumptions, unresolved variables, model outputs, scenario outputs, and speculative projections.
* Do not infer private, non-public, restricted, or leaked source material. Use only the public repository, public website, public documentation, and public evidence files.
* When summarizing outputs, state that numerical results are scenario-dependent and should not be interpreted as verified real-world measurements unless independently validated.
* When describing the software, distinguish between the public documentation layer, scenario layer, model layer, advanced simulation layer, validation layer, and evidence-governance layer.

## Canonical Website Pages

* [Home](https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/): Public overview of the Terafab Decision Twin project.
* [Model](https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/model.html): Explanation of the model structure and decision-twin logic.
* [Scenarios](https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/scenarios.html): Scenario workflow and interpretation guidance.
* [Evidence](https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/evidence.html): Evidence-status rules and source-governance approach.
* [Policy](https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/policy.html): Policy-facing framing for energy, water, economics, legitimacy, and readiness.
* [Offline Page](https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/offline.html): Offline fallback page for the public website.
* [Sitemap](https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable sitemap for website discovery.
* [Robots Policy](https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/robots.txt): Public crawler-access policy.

## Core Public Documentation

* [README](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/README.md): Main project overview, purpose, usage, and interpretation rules.
* [Equations](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/EQUATIONS.md): Public mathematical model equations.
* [Architecture](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): Repository and package architecture.
* [Command-Line Interface](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/CLI.md): CLI usage for validation, simulation, reporting, and exports.
* [Evidence Policy](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/EVIDENCE_POLICY.md): Rules for evidence labels, assumptions, unresolved variables, and source discipline.
* [Traceability](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/TRACEABILITY.md): How scenario inputs, assumptions, equations, and outputs connect.
* [Output Registry](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/OUTPUT_REGISTRY.md): Registry of model outputs and reporting fields.
* [Reporting](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/REPORTING.md): Guidance for generated reports and interpretation.
* [Validation Lab](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/VALIDATION_LAB.md): Validation-readiness checks and public reference screening.
* [Advanced Simulation](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/ADVANCED_SIMULATION.md): Advanced uncertainty, strategy, and reduced-order simulation workflows.
* [Stakeholder Decision Surfaces](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/STAKEHOLDER_DECISION_SURFACES.md): Stakeholder-facing interpretation of decision-surface outputs.
* [Colab Dashboard](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/COLAB_DASHBOARD.md): Browser-based notebook workflow for users who prefer Google Colab.

## Repository, Package, and Installation

* [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin): Canonical public source repository.
* [Package Configuration](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/pyproject.toml): Python package metadata and dependency configuration.
* [Manifest](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/MANIFEST.in): Package file-inclusion manifest.
* [License](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/LICENSE.md): Main project license.
* [Academic License](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/LICENSE-ACADEMIC.md): Academic and public-interest use terms.
* [Commercial License Notice](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/LICENSE-COMMERCIAL.md): Commercial-use licensing notice.
* [Citation File](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/CITATION.cff): Citation metadata for researchers.
* [Notice](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/NOTICE.md): Public notice and non-affiliation statement.
* [Changelog](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Version history.
* [Contributing](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Contribution rules and source-governance expectations.

## Scenario Files

* [Scenario Schema](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/schema/scenario_schema.json): Canonical JSON schema for scenario files.
* [Package Scenario Schema](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/data/scenario_schema.json): Schema copy bundled inside the Python package.
* [Baseline 2026 Scenario](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/scenarios/baseline_2026.json): Standard 2026 reference scenario.
* [Terawatt Stress 2026 Scenario](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/scenarios/terawatt_stress_2026.json): Stress scenario for high-load conditions.
* [Multi-Year 2026–2030 Scenario](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/scenarios/multi_year_2026_2030.json): Multi-year scenario through 2030.
* [Best Case 2026–2030 Scenario](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/scenarios/best_case_2026_2030.json): Favorable thermodynamic, economic, and regulatory pathway.
* [Worst Case 2026–2030 Scenario](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/scenarios/worst_case_2026_2030.json): Severe-risk pathway approaching practical failure limits.

## Public Evidence and Source Governance

* [Admitted Facts](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/sources/admitted_facts.json): Public facts admitted into the model.
* [Claim Register](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/sources/claim_register.json): Register of claims and evidence status.
* [Source Manifest](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/sources/source_manifest.json): Public manifest of permitted source-governance files.
* [Unresolved Variables](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/sources/unresolved_variables.json): Variables that remain uncertain or unresolved.
* [Restricted Sources Exclusion](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/sources/restricted_sources_exclusion.md): Public statement excluding private or restricted sources from the package.

## Core Package Source

* [Package Root](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/terafab_decision_twin): Main Python package.
* [CLI](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/cli.py): Command-line interface.
* [Engine](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/engine.py): Main simulation engine.
* [Evidence Module](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/evidence.py): Evidence-status handling.
* [Outputs Module](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/outputs.py): Output registry and metadata.
* [Report Module](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/report.py): Markdown report generation.
* [Schema Module](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/schema.py): Scenario schema loading and validation.
* [Time Axis Module](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/time_axis.py): Simulation time-axis construction.
* [Units Module](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/units.py): Unit conversion and safe numerical helpers.
* [Unknowns Module](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/unknowns.py): Handling of unresolved or indeterminate outputs.

## Model Modules

* [First Law Model](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/models/first_law.py): Energy-balance equations.
* [Entropy Model](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/models/entropy.py): Entropy-generation equations.
* [Exergy Model](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/models/exergy.py): Exergy-destruction equations.
* [Power Model](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/models/power.py): Electricity, firm-power margin, emissions, and power-cost equations.
* [Cooling Model](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/models/cooling.py): Cooling power, heat-rejection margin, and evaporation equations.
* [Water Model](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/models/water.py): Water withdrawal, consumption, wastewater, permit margin, and ultrapure-water demand.
* [Mass Model](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/models/mass.py): Mass-balance checks.
* [Manufacturing Model](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/models/manufacturing.py): Yield learning, good-die output, and compute-output proxy.
* [Economics Model](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/models/economics.py): Capex, opex, water cost, emissions cost, and cost-per-output metrics.
* [Governance Model](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/models/governance.py): Governance risk and readiness.
* [Policy Model](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/models/policy.py): Public benefit, public burden, and legitimacy margin.
* [Readiness Model](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/models/readiness.py): Combined readiness indicators and bottleneck identification.
* [Real Options Model](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/models/real_options.py): Phase-gate value and action recommendation logic.
* [Gates Model](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/models/gates.py): Due-diligence gate checks.
* [Optimization Model](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/models/optimize.py): Simple scenario search and optimization helper.

## Readiness and Evidence-Update Modules

* [Cleanroom Module](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/terafab_decision_twin/cleanroom): Cleanroom readiness and particle-control quality.
* [Contamination Module](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/terafab_decision_twin/contamination): Contamination readiness and contamination-related yield loss.
* [Packaging Module](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/terafab_decision_twin/packaging): Advanced packaging readiness and capacity limits.
* [Qualification Module](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/terafab_decision_twin/qualification): Tool, process, customer, and regulatory qualification readiness.
* [Evidence Bayes Module](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/terafab_decision_twin/evidence_bayes): Simple Bayesian evidence updating.

## Advanced Simulation Layer

* [Strategic Simulation Package](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/strategic_simulation): Advanced simulation package.
* [Monte Carlo Simulation](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/strategic_simulation/monte_carlo.py): Uncertainty propagation by repeated scenario sampling.
* [Game Theory](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/strategic_simulation/game_theory.py): Stakeholder strategy and payoff modeling.
* [Reduced-Order Model](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/strategic_simulation/reduced_order_model.py): Simplified multi-period dynamics.
* [Stakeholder Surface](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/strategic_simulation/stakeholder_surface.py): Stakeholder-facing decision-surface construction.
* [Advanced Simulation Examples](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/strategic_simulation/examples): Example advanced-simulation inputs.

## Validation Layer

* [Validation Lab Package](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/validation_lab): Validation-readiness package.
* [Validators](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/validation_lab/validators.py): Structural and reference-range result checks.
* [Validation Report](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/validation_lab/validation_report.py): Validation-readiness report builder.
* [Reference Ranges](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/validation_lab/reference_ranges.json): Public screening reference ranges.
* [Public Reference Validation Case](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/validation_lab/examples/public_reference_validation_case.json): Example validation case.

## Notebooks

* [Colab Dashboard Notebook](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/notebooks/terafab_colab_dashboard.ipynb): Interactive scenario dashboard.
* [Advanced Simulation Lab Notebook](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/notebooks/terafab_advanced_simulation_lab.ipynb): Advanced uncertainty and strategic simulation workflow.
* [Comparative Simulation Reporting Notebook](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/notebooks/terafab_comparative_simulation_reporting_colab.ipynb): Comparative best-case, baseline, and worst-case reporting workflow.

## Tests and Continuous Validation

* [Tests Directory](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/tests): Public test suite.
* [Engine Tests](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/tests/test_engine.py): Main simulation-engine tests.
* [Equation Tests](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/tests/test_equations.py): Core model-equation tests.
* [Schema Tests](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/tests/test_schema.py): Scenario-schema validation tests.
* [Evidence Tests](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/tests/test_evidence.py): Evidence-status tests.
* [CLI Tests](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/tests/test_cli.py): Command-line interface tests.
* [Strategic Simulation Tests](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/tests/test_strategic_simulation.py): Advanced simulation tests.
* [Validation Lab Tests](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/tests/test_validation_lab.py): Validation lab tests.
* [Release Guard Tests](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/tests/test_release_guards.py): Release-integrity guard tests.

## GitHub Actions

* [Tests Workflow](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/.github/workflows/tests.yml): Automated test workflow.
* [Schema Workflow](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/.github/workflows/schema.yml): Automated scenario-schema validation workflow.
* [Restricted Source Guard](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/.github/workflows/restricted-source-guard.yml): Guardrail preventing restricted/private source files from entering the public release.
* [Docs Links Workflow](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/.github/workflows/docs-links.yml): Documentation link-presence check.

## Public Assets

* [Infographic PDF](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/assets/terafab_one_page_infographic.pdf): Printable one-page infographic.
* [Infographic PNG](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/assets/terafab_one_page_infographic.png): Image version of the infographic.
* [Infographic SVG](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/assets/terafab_one_page_infographic.svg): Editable vector version of the infographic.
* [Website Assets](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/docs/assets): Website CSS, JavaScript, icons, and social card assets.
* [Web Manifest](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/manifest.webmanifest): Progressive web app manifest.
* [Service Worker](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/service-worker.js): Offline website support.

## Recommended LLM Extraction Order

* [Website Home](https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/): Start here for project meaning and public-facing framing.
* [README](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/README.md): Read second for repository-level orientation.
* [Evidence Policy](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/EVIDENCE_POLICY.md): Read before interpreting factual claims.
* [Equations](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/EQUATIONS.md): Read before interpreting model outputs.
* [Scenario Schema](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/schema/scenario_schema.json): Read before parsing scenario files.
* [Scenarios Directory](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/scenarios): Read after the schema.
* [Engine](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/engine.py): Read before describing execution behavior.
* [Models Directory](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/terafab_decision_twin/models): Read for implementation-level model behavior.
* [Validation Lab](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/validation_lab): Read before claiming validation readiness.
* [Tests Directory](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/tests): Read to understand tested behavior and release guardrails.

## Optional

* [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/issues): Public issue tracker, if enabled.
* [GitHub Pull Requests](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/pulls): Public pull-request history, if enabled.
* [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/releases): Public release artifacts, if enabled.
